scripts.prepush:light: yarn workspace @repo/ui lint && yarn workspace @repo/ui check-types && yarn workspace @lucky/admin-next lint && yarn workspace @lucky/admin-next check-types
scripts.pr:m:dev: docker exec -it lucky-backend-dev sh -lc "yarn workspace @lucky/api prisma migrate dev --name ${MIGRATION_NAME:-$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S)} && yarn workspace @lucky/api prisma generate"
scripts.pr:m:new: docker exec -it lucky-backend-dev sh -lc "yarn workspace @lucky/api prisma migrate dev --name ${MIGRATION_NAME:?'请设置 MIGRATION_NAME 变量, 例: MIGRATION_NAME=add_user_table yarn pr:m:new'} && yarn workspace @lucky/api prisma generate"
scripts.pr:m:deploy: docker exec -it lucky-backend-dev sh -lc "yarn workspace @lucky/api prisma migrate deploy && yarn workspace @lucky/api prisma generate"
scripts.pr:m:status: docker exec -it lucky-backend-dev sh -lc "yarn workspace @lucky/api prisma migrate status"
scripts.pr:m:reset: docker exec -it lucky-backend-dev sh -lc "yarn workspace @lucky/api prisma migrate reset --force --skip-seed && yarn workspace @lucky/api prisma generate"
scripts.pr:gen: docker exec -it lucky-backend-dev sh -lc "yarn workspace @lucky/api prisma generate"
scripts.pr:studio: docker exec -it lucky-backend-dev sh -lc "yarn workspace @lucky/api prisma studio --port 5555"
scripts.pr:baseline: docker exec -it lucky-backend-dev sh -lc 'mkdir -p apps/api/prisma/migrations/BASELINE && yarn workspace @lucky/api prisma migrate diff --from-empty --to-schema-datamodel apps/api/prisma/schema.prisma --script > apps/api/prisma/migrations/BASELINE/migration.sql && yarn workspace @lucky/api prisma migrate resolve --applied BASELINE && yarn workspace @lucky/api prisma migrate status'
scripts.db:init:dev: docker exec -it lucky-backend-dev sh -lc "yarn workspace @lucky/api prisma migrate deploy && yarn workspace @lucky/api prisma generate && yarn workspace @lucky/api seed"
scripts.db:seed:dev: docker exec -it lucky-backend-dev sh -lc "yarn workspace @lucky/api seed"
scripts.db:reset:dev: docker exec -it lucky-backend-dev sh -lc "yarn workspace @lucky/api prisma migrate reset --force && yarn workspace @lucky/api prisma generate"
